recommendations.title: Tokyo!
recommendations.overview: Three distinct tales unfold in the bustling city of Tokyo. Merde, a bizarre sewer-dweller, emerges from a manhole and begins terrorizing pedestrians. After his arrest, he stands trial and lashes out at a hostile courtroom. A man who has resigned hims
recommendations.director: Leos Carax, Bong Joon Ho, Michel Gondry

recommendations.title: Another 9 1/2 Weeks
recommendations.overview: Despondent at losing his lover, a man wanders the streets of Paris and has an affair with her kinky friend.

recommendations.title: Drawing Closer
recommendations.overview: With only a year left to live, 17-year-old Akito finds new meaning in life by bringing joy to a terminally ill girl who has just six months remaining.

recommendations.title: Following
recommendations.overview: Bill, an idle, unemployed aspiring writer, walks the crowded streets of London following randomly chosen strangers, a seemingly innocent entertainment that becomes dangerous when he crosses paths with a mysterious character.

recommendations.title: My First Summer
recommendations.overview: Isolated on a remote property, 16-year-old Claudia finds her world transformed when a spirited girl named Grace wanders into her garden.

recommendations.title: In Good Hands
recommendations.overview: Diagnosed with a terminal illness, a single mother encounters a suave bachelor as she grapples with the future of her headstrong six-year-old.
